VN_01.speaker: Cameldo
VN_01.text: Living the dream, playing with blue-collar workers and farmers in FreeDumb land, huh?

VN_01.speaker: Pessy
VN_01.text: It's better than playing with camels.

VN_02.speaker: Pessy
VN_02.text: Ahhhhhh! This is not the first-class flight the Orange Man promised me.

VN_02.speaker: Cameldo
VN_02.text: IT SHOULD HAVE BEEN ME, NOT HIM.

VN_02.speaker: Cameldo
VN_02.text: C'mon, I've got way more oil than that dwarf.

VN_02.speaker: Cameldo
VN_02.text: Now I guess I have to play MARIO and rescue the FIFA princess.

VN_03.speaker: Cameldo
VN_03.text: Alright, how the hell am I supposed to get to the FreeDumb land now?

VN_03.speaker: Cameldo
VN_03.text: I already spent all my money to buy 1000 balls.

VN_03.speaker: Dealer
VN_03.text:
Well, a wise man once said,
“Người không chơi là người không bao giờ thắng.”

VN_03.speaker: Dealer
VN_03.text:
Which means:
If you never gamble, you never win.

VN_03.speaker: Dealer
VN_03.text: So, do you want to be a winner, young man?

VN_03.speaker: Dealer
VN_03.text: Ah wait, sorry, I mean 41-year-old man? Haha.

VN_03.speaker: Cameldo
VN_03.text: Man... I guess I have no choice.

VN_04.speaker: Dealer
VN_04.text: You’re really good at BJ, aren’t you?

VN_04.speaker: Dealer
VN_04.text: You have to win three games to earn a one-way ticket to the FreeDumb Land.

VN_05.speaker: Dealer
VN_05.text: Oh, you’re actually good at BJ. Haha.

VN_05.speaker: Cameldo
VN_05.text: Do you want to be kicked like Curtis Jones?

VN_06.speaker: Dealer
VN_06.text: Here’s your ticket to FreeDumb Land with a BENCH First-Class seat.

VN_06.speaker: Dealer
VN_06.text: Before you go, I’ll give you two dice so you can play while sitting on the bench.

VN_07A.speaker: Dealer
VN_07A.text: Hey you, you completely forgot your PRINCESS.

VN_07A.speaker: Cameldo
VN_07A.text: He’s not my princess — he’s the FIFA princess.

VN_07A.speaker: Cameldo
VN_07A.text: Why would I care about that dwarf?

VN_07A.speaker: Cameldo
VN_07A.text: Now it’s time to go to DRAGOLANDIA to become a legend.

VN_07.speaker: Dragon King
VN_07.text: Hello adventurer, you came to FreeDumb Land to rescue your friends?

VN_07.speaker: Dragon King
VN_07.text: Defeat me if you want to be the hero.

VN_07.speaker: Cameldo
VN_07.text: I came here to win the golden trophy.

VN_07.speaker: Dragon King
VN_07.text: Your beloved friend is in danger.

VN_07.speaker: Cameldo
VN_07.text: I don’t even care about that dwarf.

VN_07.speaker: Dragon King
VN_07.text: Kill me if you want to rescue your partner!

VN_07.speaker: Cameldo
VN_07.text: Are you not listening to me?

VN_07.speaker: Cameldo
VN_07.text: AGHHHH, this stupid dragon must be an AI product.

VN_08.speaker: Cameldo
VN_08.text: I’m saying I’m here for the trophy, not to fight you.

VN_08.speaker: Cameldo
VN_08.text: How the hell am I supposed to fight a dragon?

VN_08.speaker: Cameldo
VN_08.text: I’m not that DONKEY from the SHREK franchise.

VN_08.speaker: Dragon King
VN_08.text: I will give you one more free strike.

VN_09.speaker: Dragon King
VN_09.text: That’s why you should stay on the bench and play with your dice.

VN_09.speaker: Cameldo
VN_09.text: Oh hell no, what am I supposed to do?

VN_09.speaker: Roronoa Zoro
VN_09.text: If you get 6–6, you will have the power to defeat the dragon.

VN_09.speaker: Cameldo
VN_09.text: Why the hell are you talking to me?

VN_09.speaker: Cameldo
VN_09.text: Are you out of your damn mind?

VN_11.speaker: Roronoa Zoro
VN_11.text: You have all the power from gamblers around the world.

VN_11.speaker: Dragon King
VN_11.text: This is not a Power Rangers movie.

VN_13.speaker: Dragon King
VN_13.text: Why the hell did you get two turns in a row?

VN_13.speaker: Dragon King
VN_13.text: This is a turn-based game, you fool.

VN_14.speaker: Dragon King
VN_14.text: This must be an unfinished turn-based game made by a stupid AI agent that costs thousands of dollars a month.

VN_14.speaker: Dragon King
VN_14.text: I’m not even a beloved anime girl with three heads.

VN_14.speaker: Dragon King
VN_14.text: You defeated me and saved your friend — Pessy.

VN_14.speaker: Dragon King
VN_14.text:
This game is called
“Where Is Pessy?”

VN_14.speaker: Dragon King
VN_14.text: This is definitely because the AI messed up the prompt.

VN_14.speaker: Dragon King
VN_14.text: I told you from the start:

VN_14.speaker: Dragon King
VN_14.text: DO NOT vibe-code a video game.
